rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relation to Educ. Code §37.152, which addresses personal hazing offenses in educational institutions.
quote:
Sec. 37.152. PERSONAL HAZING OFFENSE. (a) A person commits an offense if the person:
(1) engages in hazing;
_note: Rule text is entirely unrelated to the proposed change; no conflict exists.
